title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies in Coimbatore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies:
KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies!
